channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-06-11
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: Press release - MEPs strike a deal to strengthen Europe’s defence readiness
item.description: On Wednesday, Parliament and Council negotiators agreed on proposals to accelerate defence investment and improve the EU’s responsiveness to security challenges. Committee on the Environment, Public Health and Food Safety Committee on the Internal Market and Consumer Protection Committee on Industry, Research and Energy Committee on Security and Defence Source : © European Union, 2026 - EP — Thématique géopolitique ; source jugée fiable (european parliament - press releases) ; impact marché.

item.title: EU and Korea sign landmark digital trade agreement at summit
item.description: Today, the EU and the Republic of Korea signed a landmark Digital Trade Agreement (DTA) during the EU-Republic of Korea Summit held in Brussels. — Thématique géopolitique ; source jugée fiable (european commission - eu trade news) ; impact énergie / commerce.
